tool_calls.input:
{"code":"(def merged-prs 
  (github_pull_requests {:state "merged"}))

(def prs-closing-linear 
  (filter :closes_linear merged-prs))

(def linear-ids 
  (distinct (map :closes_linear prs-closing-linear)))

(def linear-issues-map 
  (reduce (fn [m issue] (assoc m (:id issue) issue)) 
          {} 
          (linear_issues {:id linear-ids})))

(def results 
  (filter
